ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-22-2004. FEB-27-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR SAMUEL KENNETH FENG APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-22-2004 THROUGH JUN-20-2004.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-20-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR SAMUEL K. FENG

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON AUG-27-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. JUL-20-2004 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE COMPLAINT, ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION.
